name: resolve_product_query
description: Use this whenever a user asks about products, recommendations, prices, or availability. Use this instead of guessing or relying on stale knowledge.

query.description: Natural language product search query (e.g., 'best laptop for programming', 'cheap headphones under $50')

market.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code (e.g., 'US', 'SG'). Defaults to 'US' if not specified.

constraints.description: List of required features or constraints (e.g., ['16GB RAM', 'SSD', 'long battery life'])

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

use_when: User asks 'I need a Z under $BUDGET'
User asks 'what product should I buy'
User asks about product comparisons or recommendations

response_fields.buywhere_score: Product quality ranking (0-1, higher is better)
response_fields.reason_for_rank: Why this product was ranked here
